Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface IPlayerData

  • public interface IPlayerData
    Provides access to all persistent data categories for a player, including companion, dialog, quest, faction, transport, mail, trade, and ability data.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IPlayerAbilityData getAbilityData()  
      IPlayerBankData getBankData()  
      ICustomNpc getCompanion()
      Returns the player's companion NPC.
      int getCompanionID()  
      IPlayerDialogData getDialogData()  
      IPlayerFactionData getFactionData()  
      IPlayerItemGiverData getItemGiverData()  
      IPlayerMailData getMailData()  
      IPlayerQuestData getQuestData()  
      IPlayerTradeData getTradeData()  
      IPlayerTransportData getTransportData()  
      boolean hasCompanion()  
      void save()
      Saves all player data to disk.
      void setCompanion​(ICustomNpc npc)
      Sets the player's companion NPC.

    • Method Detail

      • setCompanion

        void setCompanion​(ICustomNpc npc)
        Sets the player's companion NPC.
        Parameters:
        npc - the companion NPC, or null to clear.

      • getCompanion

        ICustomNpc getCompanion()
        Returns the player's companion NPC.
        Returns:
        the companion NPC, or null if none.

      • hasCompanion

        boolean hasCompanion()
        Returns:
        true if the player currently has a companion NPC.

      • getCompanionID

        int getCompanionID()
        Returns:
        the entity ID of the companion, or -1 if none.

      • getDialogData

        IPlayerDialogData getDialogData()
        Returns:
        the player's dialog data.

      • getBankData

        IPlayerBankData getBankData()
        Returns:
        the player's bank data.

      • getQuestData

        IPlayerQuestData getQuestData()
        Returns:
        the player's quest data.

      • getTransportData

        IPlayerTransportData getTransportData()
        Returns:
        the player's transport data.

      • getFactionData

        IPlayerFactionData getFactionData()
        Returns:
        the player's faction data.

      • getItemGiverData

        IPlayerItemGiverData getItemGiverData()
        Returns:
        the player's item giver data.

      • getMailData

        IPlayerMailData getMailData()
        Returns:
        the player's mail data.

      • getTradeData

        IPlayerTradeData getTradeData()
        Returns:
        the player's trade data.

      • getAbilityData

        IPlayerAbilityData getAbilityData()
        Returns:
        the player's ability data.

      • save

        void save()
        Saves all player data to disk.
